GreenRoaches.name: Green Roaches (Enchancing)
GreenRoaches.desc: Enchances the emperor with buffs [Gain 1 Binding Vow for every 2000 Green Roaches] (Max 10000)

EnragedGreenRoaches.name: Green Roaches (Enraged)
EnragedGreenRoaches.desc: For every stack gain 1 Burn/Bleed/Bind for every tenth stack and 1 Clash Power Down for every twentieth stack and 1 Plus Coin Drop for every fiftieth stack (Max 1000)
EnragedGreenRoaches.flavor: These Roaches are starved and hungry for food.

SukunaPlotArmor.name: Binding Vow (Green Emperor)
SukunaPlotArmor.desc: Gain 1 restriction and Damage Up and 2 Near-light Superbattery for every Binding Vow (Max 20)

Restriction.name: Restriction
Restriction.desc: Gain 1 Defense Level Down for every Restriction, gain 1 fragile for every ten Restrictions (Max 100)
